text_block_list.name: Introverted Girl
text_block_list.text: Aaahhh... But I'm really scared!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You'll be fine! You've come all this way to tour
the academy, so why don't you take a good look
around?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing somebody crying, I follow the sound to
its source. There, I find Ines Fujin and Biwa
Hayahide consoling a child.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Well, this kid's come to tour the
academy, so I was hoping to show her the track,
but...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She got frightened after a scuffle broke out
between two students who were training. It'd be
such a shame to send her home in this state...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! She can't go home like this! Hmm. Maybe
we should just explain what she saw!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...So you see, those two share a synergy that's
very conducive to mutual improvement. What you
witnessed really wasn't a "fight," per se.

text_block_list.name: Introverted Girl
text_block_list.text: B-but they were angry... They were fighting!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You can't force her to understand, so maybe you'd better ease up! Try explaining more gently.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
D-don't be afraiiid. Racing is truuuly delightful! ♪
La, la, laaa. ♪

text_block_list.name: Introverted Girl
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! Now I'm even more scared!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, this isn't working! We've tried so many
things to pique her interest, but she just won't
come anywhere near the track!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. I'm reminded of when my little sister refuses
to eat her vegetables. Although when it comes to
running, my sister is always hot on my heels.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, my sisters are the same. They stick to me
like glue the moment I try to leave for training.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hey, that gives me an idea!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Who's up for some fun at the track? I think
we're free to use that one over there!

text_block_list.name: Introverted Girl
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sounds great! It's incredibly refreshing to go
running on a wide open track... But alas! I think
it'll just be the two of us today!

text_block_list.name: Introverted Girl
text_block_list.text: W-wait up!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Take a looky-look! The staff here work every day
to keep this turf nice and tidy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And here's where the gentle slope starts. This is
where I run to build my stamina. And then there's
the...

text_block_list.name: Introverted Girl
text_block_list.text: Wait! Pleeease! You're way too fast...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you'll be just fine! I know you can catch up!

text_block_list.name: Introverted Girl
text_block_list.text: Ah... Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And that's where my trainer watches me from!
Apparently, you can see the whole track really
well from there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know it, the tour has become a full-on
chase. And while Ines Fujin looks to be holding
back, the younger girl seems to be running as fast
as she can.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: All right, time to up the pace!

text_block_list.name: Introverted Girl
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that concludes the tour! Be sure to take
care on your way home, okay?

text_block_list.name: Introverted Girl
text_block_list.text:
I will... So, um, I had a really fun time running
after you today!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Glad to hear it! Let's play again sometime!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: See ya later, alligator! Hehe.
choice_data_list:
Do you think she has the potential to be your
underclassman one day?
You really showed your big sister side today!
You really showed your big sister side today!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: See ya later, alligator! Hehe.
choice_data_list:
Do you think she has the potential to be your
underclassman one day?
You really showed your big sister side today!
You really showed your big sister side today!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I think she's got the stuff!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. I was watching you two from afar, but she
really kept up with you, Ines.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she was chasing after me with this twinkle
in her eyes... I sure she'll be at Tracen again in a
few years' time—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Nope, scratch that. I want to see her at the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And when she's there... I bet we'll be able to put
each other to the test!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin is definitely a great mentor—but at the
same time, there's no mistaking the fierce fighting
spirit in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I didn't do that much. ♪ I just wanted to
show her how fun it is to run together with
someone!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Heya-hey, Hayahide! Let's go for a run—the
track's free for the taking!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm. I'd be glad to join you, but only after we let
the student council know that the tour is—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yay! Then let's race to the student council office!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...See?! Wouldn't it be a shame to go your whole
life without knowing how wonderful this is?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even while being kind and sisterly, she embraces
the thrills of running more than anyone... Today, I
got a great glimpse into Ines Fujin's character!
